comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Verified in current checkout. extensions/tau/src/agents-menu/index.ts:356-359, 371-372, and 384-386 return immediately when loadRegistrySafe(...) yields null. The only place that updates the agent tool transform is syncAgentToolAvailability(...) at extensions/tau/src/agents-menu/index.ts:145-151, and the only description refresh on these paths is also inside the success path. shared/tool-activation.ts keeps transforms in a WeakMap keyed only by ExtensionAPI, so the prior AGENT_TOOL_ACTIVATION_KEY transform persists until explicitly replaced or removed. Therefore a previously successful session can leave the agent tool active in pi.getActiveTools() and leave the prior description intact even after a later cwd/session has registry load or validation failure. This is a real fail-open/stale-state bug; exact visibility depends on prior session state.
